name: "Well maybe I would've been better off without friends like you!"
description: So basically that one scene from the my little pony movie but with the beasts, also shadow milk cookie pov so youre like basically crashing out at eternql sugar, burning spice, mystic flour and silent salt...yeah...also this is just a silly what if sieltn salt wasnt the one that helped sealed the beasts away and that shadow milk didnt trust the other beasts.
